generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures swing angle of hoist motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of swing angle and wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model for gantry crane kinematics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model of gantry crane for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for real-time crane monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for IoT communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for interfacing physical crane with virtual twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance CADEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for CAD model integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for crane dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Hardware controller for stepper motors and electromagnet"
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryCommandAction
]

instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical sensor data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane trajectories using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated and actual trajectories for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationNotificationAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for trajectory testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends movement commands to cart and hoist motors"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging status and integrity"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds"
]

instance ValidationNotificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers operator notification for maintenance when validation breaches occur"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results used for trajectory validation"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement along gantry crane"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for container pickup"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, Arduino
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin for gantry crane system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application are sent through the Physical Crane Interface to adjust motor movements and electromagnet operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with the Continuous Validation Service comparing executed trajectories against simulations at operational speeds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical components (crane frame, motors, controllers, sensors) interact with digital containers (database, dashboard, services) via MQTT, deployed on a single PC using Docker for service orchestration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), with the DT monitoring and controlling the physical crane during active use for validation and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between simulated and actual trajectory data, comparing against predefined thresholds to detect discrepancies and notify operators."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical Crane Interface connects to crane controllers via proprietary protocols (not specified); digital twin services communicate via Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT Broker"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containers for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, and Grafana; Python services bundled in gantrylib module; deployed on a personal computer via docker compose."
]
